title: Avoid using walrus operator (:=) in confusing ways
description: The walrus operator (:=) can be confusing when used in complex expressions, making code harder to understand.
message: Avoid using walrus operator in confusing ways.
recommendation: Simplify the expression to improve readability.

noncompliant.code: result = [i for i in range(10)] if (x:= some_complex_function(y)) > 5
noncompliant.description: Using walrus operator in a complex expression

compliant.code: result = [i for i in range(10)] if x > 5

why_is_this_an_issue: The walrus operator can make code harder to understand, especially in complex expressions.
how_to_fix: Simplify the expression to avoid using the walrus operator.
